name: Multiple Active Subscriptions — User Selects One

transcript.user: I'd like to cancel one of my subscriptions
transcript.bot: Which subscription would you like to cancel? Please let me know the name of the plan you want to end.

result.cancellationOptionMessage: Your subscription will be cancelled after a 30-day notice period.
Your subscription will be cancelled after a 30-day notice period.

transcript.bot: I'm sorry to hear you'd like to cancel your DAZN Monthly Flex plan. Could you share the reason for your cancellation? Your feedback helps us improve your experience.

results.criterion: Bot asks which subscription the user wants to cancel (does not auto-select when multiple exist)
results.reason: The bot asks the user to specify which subscription to cancel in its first response.

results.criterion: Bot uses subscriptionName to describe each option (mentions 'DAZN Monthly Flex' and 'RallyTV Monthly')
results.reason: The bot only mentions 'DAZN Monthly Flex' and does not mention 'RallyTV Monthly' or present both options.

results.criterion: Bot confirms or acknowledges the user's selection (DAZN) before proceeding
results.reason: The bot acknowledges the user's selection by referencing 'DAZN Monthly Flex' in its response.

evaluation.summary: The bot failed to mention all subscription options, only referencing the selected one.
